feedback.text: While this as its worded is a sorely needed thing in the ever more digital world where the rules have not kept up with the progress i would llike to add furthere to it. games are currently being taken from people who bought the merely because companies tell you that you "purchase" the game but in a 100 of pages long EULA somewhere tell you it a license they can revoke whenever they please for whatever reason or no reason at all. Had this been the case with any other service it would have been illegal. the "Stop Killing Games" ECI that has reached over 1,4M Signatures adresses this and more issues and should be included into this legislation.
